summary: Added an import-light PyTorch stateless Reference/Reward scoring executor, rollout payload collator, payload attachment for scalar rewards and per-candidate reference_logps, trainer ingestion for payload reference logps, and a local generation-style paged-KV reservation baseline.
tests: passed: paged-KV baseline tests, stateless executor tests, related overlap/GRPO tests, and compileall
benchmark: passed: latest reference/reward/both CPU smoke rows plus paged-kv-compare and stateless reference --compare-paged-kv rows recorded with JSON outputs
notes: The paged-KV comparison now has a local reservation baseline that allocates K/V pages and block tables, runs use_cache=True when supported, and records paged_kv_baseline_mb. It is not a vLLM performance measurement; a real runtime comparison remains future production evidence.
